zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese Giffard de Bolbec於大約1025年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希時，她的父親Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux17歲，母親Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse12歲。她於1054年與Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1113年享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese Giffard de Bolbec于大约1025年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希时，她的父亲Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux17岁，母亲Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse12岁。她于1054年与Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1113年享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bolbec
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name for someone from Houlbec, the name of several places in Normandy. It is formed with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’. Compare Dalbec .

variants.name: Dalbec
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Euclide, Jean-Marc, Rosaire.

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese Giffard de Bolbec was born about 1025, in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux, was 17 and her mother, Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse, was 12. She married Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare in 1054, in Longueville, Calvados, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1113, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese Giffard de Bolbec est née environ 1025, à Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare en 1054, à Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1113, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese Giffard de Bolbec um 1025 in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux 17 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse 12. Sie hat 1054 in Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1113 im Alter von 89 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese Giffard de Bolbec è nata il circa 1025 nel Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare nel 1054, nel Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1113, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese Giffard de Bolbecが約1025年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロングエヴィレ-スル-スシで生まれた時，父Gauthier I Giffard le Vieuxは17歳，母Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuseは12歳であった。1054年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスロングエヴィルでRichard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1113年に89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese Giffard de Bolbec(이)가 대략 1025년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 론구에비레-수-스시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1054년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 론구에빌에서 Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1113년 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clare, 3393, Suffolk, England, Royaume-U: Clare, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese Giffard de Bolbec nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare em 1054, em Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1113, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese Giffard de Bolbec родилась около 1025 г. в местности лонгуевилле-сур-сси, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare в 1054 г. в местности лонгуевилл, калвадос, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1113 г. в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese Giffard de Bolbec nació aproximadamente 1025, en Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gauthier I Giffard le Vieux, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Flaitel l'Orgueilleuse, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Richard de Brionne-Bienfaite de Clare en 1054, en Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1113, a la edad de 89 años.
